# datahub_data_contracts (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Returns the URNs of all DataHub data contracts visible to the authenticated principal.

Backed by `searchAcrossEntities` (OpenSearch). Contracts created within the last few seconds may not yet appear. Feed the `urns` output into an `import {}` for-each block to bulk-import existing contracts.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datahub_data_contracts" "all" {}

output "data_contract_urns" {
  description = "URNs of all DataHub data contracts."
  value       = data.datahub_data_contracts.all.urns
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `urns` (List of String) List of data contract URNs (e.g. `["urn:li:dataContract:<id>"]`).
